meta.name: Nesa
meta.bio: Passionate developer building games, apps, and web experiences. Always learning, always shipping.

blog.title: Welcome to my corner of the internet
blog.excerpt: This is where I share what I'm building, learning, and thinking about.
blog.content:
# Welcome!

This site is where I document my journey as a developer and creator. Expect posts about game dev, web projects, mobile apps, and whatever rabbit hole I've fallen into this week.

Stay tuned — things are just getting started. 🚀

blog.title: How i ended up making 30000 $ Usd last year
blog.excerpt: I am obviously joking, and more espessialy mocking guys who think they are smarter than others
blog.content: I am obviously joking, and more espessialy mocking guys who think they are smarter than others

games.title: Bardle
games.description: A bilingual Wordle clone for English and Armenian. Test your vocabulary in two languages — 5 letters, 6 guesses, infinite fun.

games.title: Broken Phone
games.description: A digital take on the classic Telephone game. Pass messages through a chain of players and watch the chaos unfold.

experience.description: Building games, web apps, and mobile applications independently.
